title: PVP Stats+
description: The mod offers a customizable HUD, detailed match tracking, tiered progression, and performance analytics for PvP, allowing players to optimize their interface, track stats, and refine their combat skills.
body:
![pvp stats fabric 1.21](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/924a37d76ce3e62b93ed2dcbd290d7af497dae21.png)

## **HUD Editor** 🖥️  
The HUD Editor gives you complete control over your PvP interface, letting you arrange and toggle visual elements for maximum clarity and comfort.

---

### **Features**  
1. **Visibility Control**  
   - Toggle elements like the scoreboard or recording indicator on or off.  
   - Great for reducing screen clutter or tailoring your view to your playstyle.

<details style="margin-bottom: 1rem;">
  <summary>Click to watch video</summary>
  <iframe 
    width="560" 
    height="315" 
    src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/yiM_0o0fQeo" 
    title="YouTube video player" 
    frameborder="0" 
    allowfullscreen>
  </iframe>
</details>

2. **Score Elements GUI**  
   - Right-click the scoreboard to open a configuration menu.  
   - **Reset Scores** between matches or tournaments.  
   - Customize the view:
     - Scores Only  
     - Heads + Scores

<details style="margin-bottom: 1rem;">
  <summary>Click to watch video</summary>
  <iframe 
    width="560" 
    height="315" 
    src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/NHboCI5aByk" 
    title="YouTube video player" 
    frameborder="0" 
    allowfullscreen>
  </iframe>
</details>

3. **Resizable HUD**  
   - Use the mouse scroll wheel to resize HUD elements like the scoreboard and recorder.  
   - Easy access to the GUI with right-click makes in-game adjustments quick and intuitive.

<details style="margin-bottom: 1rem;">
  <summary>Click to watch video</summary>
  <iframe 
    width="560" 
    height="315" 
    src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/rzEVAcu8CeU" 
    title="YouTube video player" 
    frameborder="0" 
    allowfullscreen>
  </iframe>
</details>

---

## **Recorder GUI** 🕹️  
Track stats precisely with the Recorder GUI, designed for all PvP modes.

### **How It Works**  
1. **9-Box Interface**  
   - Choose from modes like:
     - Crystal PvP  
     - Cart PvP  
     - Netherite Pot  
     - Diamond Pot  
     - SMP  
     - UHC  
     - Axe PvP  
     - Sword PvP  

2. **Quick Activation**  
   - After selecting a mode, your stats begin tracking the moment you hit another player.

3. **Auto-Save**  
   - After a match, your stats are automatically sent to the Stats GUI.

<details style="margin-bottom: 1rem;">
  <summary>Click to watch video</summary>
  <iframe 
    width="560" 
    height="315" 
    src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/Fh_ITWoV0Ms" 
    title="YouTube video player" 
    frameborder="0" 
    allowfullscreen>
  </iframe>
</details>

4. **Custom Modes**  
   - Use `/creategamemode {item} {name}` to add your own game modes.

<details style="margin-bottom: 1rem;">
  <summary>Click to watch video</summary>
  <iframe 
    width="560"

    allowfullscreen>

</details>

5. **Delete Options**  
   - **Ctrl + Delete**: Removes all hotkeys.

## **Indicator Element** 💡  
A clear, blinking icon lets you know when you're recording.

### **Features**  
- Blinks when recording is active, stops when paused.  
- Right-click the bar to toggle manually.

<details style="margin-bottom: 1rem;">
  <summary>Click to watch video</summary>
  <iframe 
    width="560" 
    height="315" 
    src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/QkHX7Mkzz7Q" 
    title="YouTube video player" 
    frameborder="0" 
    allowfullscreen>
  </iframe>
</details>

## **Stats GUI** 📊  
Your personal analytics dashboard for PvP matches.

### **Features**  
1. **Match Overview**  
   - Win (🟢) or lose (🔴) indicators  
   - Player heads, usernames  
   - Sort using Ascending or Descending buttons

<details style="margin-bottom: 1rem;">
  <summary>Click to watch video</summary>
  <iframe 
    width="560" 
    height="315" 
    src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/olzGorkWXa0" 
    title="YouTube video player" 
    frameborder="0" 
    allowfullscreen>
  </iframe>
</details>

2. **Detailed Match Stats**  
   - Mode-specific tracking:  
     - Items used  
     - Damage dealt  
     - Attack types  
     - Match duration ⏱️  
     - Unique Match ID

<details style="margin-bottom: 1rem;">
  <summary>Click to watch video</summary>
  <iframe 
    width="560" 
    height="315" 
    src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/-t2m51ROIdQ" 
    title="YouTube video player" 
    frameborder="0" 
    allowfullscreen>
  </iframe>
</details>

3. **K/D Ratio**  
   - Automatically calculated and displayed

4. **Tiers & Progression System**  
   - Shows your current tier and recent changes

<details style="margin-bottom: 1rem;">
  <summary>Click to watch video</summary>
  <iframe 
    width="560" 
    height="315" 
    src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/yx4N0d0Emto" 
    title="YouTube video player" 
    frameborder="0" 
    allowfullscreen>
  </iframe>
</details>

5. **Deletion Options**  
   - **Ctrl + Delete**: Delete all game modes  
   - **Hover + Delete**: Delete a specific mode

## **Tiers & Progression System** 🏅  
Earn recognition for your skill and growth in PvP.

### **Tier Breakdown**  
- **High Tier (HT1–HT5)**: Top performers  
- **Low Tier (LT1–LT5)**: New or learning players

### **Progression**  
- Climb tiers with wins and kills  
- Fall back after frequent losses  
- Tiers are color-coded in the Stats GUI  
- Exclusive rewards at HT1

---

## **Why Use This Mod?** 💡  
- 📈 Analyze your progress  
- 🔍 Improve your combat strategy  
- 🎨 Customize your HUD  
- 🏆 Track & show off your K/D and tier rank
